ddt:Target.Name: USM 95 BDKE - Soft C2/C3/C4 v3
ddt:Target.Description:
USM BD95
Slot B3.1 PSP1/PSP2 C2.0 PS C3.0
L. GERVAIS tél : 01 76 85 07 79 laurent.gervais@renault.com
A. GONCALVES tél : 01 76 85 78 61 anabela.goncalves-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Item.Text: Maximum clutch travel switch not active

Data.Name: V_TM_TimeAtOpening_mem
Data.Comment: Variable which contains the time of the last opening of the BDU during parking time (bad SOC)

Item.Text: Test Ok (Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is not more than 0.3)
Test NOK(Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is more than 0.3)
Running in idle mode or stopped
Oil Pressure Failure is not inhibited
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
No oil pressure switch fault warning requested
Oil pressure switch fault warning requested
Primary ign supply relay ctrl OFF
Primary ign supply relay ctrl ON
no inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis
inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis
The BDU alert can only be erased by diag tool
The BDU alert disappears once the failure had
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

Item.Text: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate
No activation of IHM Low battery voltage
Activation of IHM Low battery voltage

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of low speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of high speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress high speed

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress low speed (blocking)

Item.Text: No direct compressor activation from ECM is used
Direct compressor activation from ECM is used
neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is inhibited
neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is not inhibited
No BDU command line failure - in
No auto stop blocked reached protection
Allows to switch OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0
Inhibits from switching OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0
Minimum clutch travel switch not active

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: Start diagnostic session

Request.Name: Read Digital Inputs
Request.Comment: Read digital inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Analog Inputs
Request.Comment: Read analog inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Digital Outputs
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Diagnostic Inputs
Request.Comment: Read diagnostic inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read PWM Outputs
Request.Comment: Read PWM outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Digital Outputs Control
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: Read sent CAN data
Request.Comment: USM_91_V7.dbc Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read received CAN data
Request.Comment: USM_91_V7.dbc Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read config
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read VIN
Request.Comment: Read vehicle number identification Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Traceability
Request.Comment: Managed by supplier, must be clarify by supplier Saved if possible in ROM otherwise in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read CAN status
Request.Comment: Read CAN Status Saved following CRS document (EEPROM and RAM)/ see "CRS v2.0" document for Communication Protocol and 36-02-027 --a document for Can Sleep Specification

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: Application DTC in EEPROM and Routine DTC in RAM

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000 / Application DTC in EEPROM

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: Read calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: WriteMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Read Diagnosis calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read SmartFet calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: Read EEM variables
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: PWM & Voltage Outputs Control
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

Device.Name: Position Lights RH & Rear RH & Plate
